afghanistan.name: Afghanistan
afghanistan.fact: Afghanistan is a landlocked country known for its rugged mountains and rich cultural history along the ancient Silk Road.

albania.name: Albania
albania.fact: Albania is known for its beautiful Adriatic and Ionian coastlines, historic castles, and warm hospitality.

algeria.name: Algeria
algeria.fact: Algeria is Africa's largest country by land area and is home to a vast portion of the Sahara Desert.

andorra.name: Andorra
andorra.fact: Andorra is a tiny mountain country famous for skiing, hiking, and duty-free shopping.

angola.name: Angola
angola.fact: Angola has abundant natural resources including oil and diamonds and features a long Atlantic coastline.

antiguaandbarbuda.name: Antigua and Barbuda
antiguaandbarbuda.fact: Antigua and Barbuda is famous for having 365 beaches—one for every day of the year.

argentina.name: Argentina
argentina.fact: Argentina is home to Patagonia, Iguazú Falls, and is renowned for tango, football, and beef.

armenia.name: Armenia
armenia.fact: Armenia is one of the world's oldest Christian nations and is known for its ancient monasteries.

australia.name: Australia
australia.fact: Australia is the only country that occupies an entire continent and is home to unique wildlife like kangaroos and koalas.

austria.name: Austria
austria.fact: Austria is famous for the Alps, classical music, and composers such as Mozart and Strauss.

azerbaijan.name: Azerbaijan
azerbaijan.fact: Known as the 'Land of Fire,' Azerbaijan has natural gas vents that have burned for centuries.

bahamas.name: Bahamas
bahamas.fact: The Bahamas consists of over 700 islands and is famous for its crystal-clear turquoise waters.

bahrain.name: Bahrain
bahrain.fact: Bahrain is an island nation in the Persian Gulf known for its financial sector and Formula One Grand Prix.

bangladesh.name: Bangladesh
bangladesh.fact: Bangladesh is one of the world's most densely populated countries and is home to the Sundarbans mangrove forest.

barbados.name: Barbados
barbados.fact: Barbados is known for beautiful beaches, coral reefs, and as the birthplace of Rihanna.

belarus.name: Belarus
belarus.fact: Belarus is known for its forests, lakes, and well-preserved medieval castles.

belgium.name: Belgium
belgium.fact: Belgium is famous for chocolate, waffles, beer, and as the headquarters of the European Union.

belize.name: Belize
belize.fact: Belize is home to the world's second-largest barrier reef and ancient Maya ruins.

benin.name: Benin
benin.fact: Benin is considered the birthplace of the Vodun (Voodoo) religion.

bhutan.name: Bhutan
bhutan.fact: Bhutan measures success using Gross National Happiness instead of Gross Domestic Product alone.

bolivia.name: Bolivia
bolivia.fact: Bolivia is home to Salar de Uyuni, the world's largest salt flat.

bosniaandherzegovina.name: Bosnia and Herzegovina
bosniaandherzegovina.fact: Bosnia and Herzegovina is known for its diverse cultures, Ottoman architecture, and the historic Stari Most bridge.

botswana.name: Botswana
botswana.fact: Botswana is home to the Okavango Delta, one of the world's largest inland deltas.

brazil.name: Brazil
brazil.fact: Brazil is the largest country in South America and contains much of the Amazon Rainforest.

brunei.name: Brunei
brunei.fact: Brunei is a wealthy nation known for its oil and natural gas reserves.

bulgaria.name: Bulgaria
bulgaria.fact: Bulgaria is one of Europe's oldest countries and is famous for its rose oil production.

burkinafaso.name: Burkina Faso
burkinafaso.fact: Burkina Faso is known for its vibrant traditional music and annual film festival FESPACO.

burundi.name: Burundi
burundi.fact: Burundi is one of Africa's smallest countries and is famous for its drumming traditions.

capoverde.name: Cabo Verde
capoverde.fact: Cabo Verde is an island nation in the Atlantic Ocean known for volcanic landscapes and music.

cambodia.name: Cambodia
cambodia.fact: Cambodia is home to Angkor Wat, the world's largest religious monument.

cameroon.name: Cameroon
cameroon.fact: Cameroon is often called 'Africa in miniature' because of its diverse geography and cultures.

canada.name: Canada
canada.fact: Canada has the world's longest coastline and more lakes than any other country.

centralafricanrepublic.name: Central African Republic
centralafricanrepublic.fact: The Central African Republic is rich in diamonds, gold, and diverse wildlife.

chad.name: Chad
chad.fact: Chad is named after Lake Chad, one of Africa's largest freshwater lakes.

chile.name: Chile
chile.fact: Chile is one of the longest north-south countries in the world and is home to the Atacama Desert.

china.name: China
china.fact: China is home to the Great Wall, one of the world's most famous landmarks.

colombia.name: Colombia
colombia.fact: Colombia is one of the world's largest producers of high-quality coffee and is rich in biodiversity.

comoros.name: Comoros
comoros.fact: Comoros is an island nation in the Indian Ocean known for producing ylang-ylang essential oil.

congo.name: Congo
congo.fact: The Republic of the Congo is known for its tropical rainforests and diverse wildlife.

costarica.name: Costa Rica
costarica.fact: Costa Rica is famous for its biodiversity and produces nearly all of its electricity from renewable energy.

croatia.name: Croatia
croatia.fact: Croatia is known for its beautiful Adriatic coastline and the historic city of Dubrovnik.

cuba.name: Cuba
cuba.fact: Cuba is famous for classic vintage cars, cigars, salsa music, and colonial architecture.

cyprus.name: Cyprus
cyprus.fact: Cyprus is an island nation in the eastern Mediterranean with a rich blend of Greek and Turkish heritage.

czechia.name: Czech Republic (Czechia)
czechia.fact: Czechia is known for its medieval towns, castles, and world-famous beer.

cotedivoire.name: Côte d'Ivoire
cotedivoire.fact: Côte d'Ivoire is the world's largest producer of cocoa beans.

democraticrepublicofthecongo.name: Democratic Republic of the Congo
democraticrepublicofthecongo.fact: The Democratic Republic of the Congo contains the second-largest rainforest in the world after the Amazon.

denmark.name: Denmark
denmark.fact: Denmark is consistently ranked among the happiest countries in the world and is the home of LEGO.

djibouti.name: Djibouti
djibouti.fact: Djibouti is strategically located at the entrance to the Red Sea and is known for Lake Assal, one of the saltiest lakes on Earth.

dominica.name: Dominica
dominica.fact: Dominica is called the 'Nature Island of the Caribbean' because of its lush rainforests and hot springs.

dominicanrepublic.name: Dominican Republic
dominicanrepublic.fact: The Dominican Republic occupies the eastern two-thirds of the island of Hispaniola and is famous for its beaches and resorts.

ecuador.name: Ecuador
ecuador.fact: Ecuador is named after the Equator and is home to the Galápagos Islands.

egypt.name: Egypt
egypt.fact: Egypt is famous for the ancient pyramids, the Sphinx, and the Nile River, the world's longest river.

elsalvador.name: El Salvador
elsalvador.fact: El Salvador is the smallest country in Central America and is known as the 'Land of Volcanoes.'

equatorialguinea.name: Equatorial Guinea
equatorialguinea.fact: Equatorial Guinea is the only sovereign African country where Spanish is an official language.

eritrea.name: Eritrea
eritrea.fact: Eritrea has a long Red Sea coastline and is known for the well-preserved Italian architecture in Asmara.

estonia.name: Estonia
estonia.fact: Estonia is one of the world's most digitally advanced countries, offering many government services online.

eswatini.name: Eswatini
eswatini.fact: Eswatini, formerly known as Swaziland, is one of the few remaining absolute monarchies in the world.

ethiopia.name: Ethiopia
ethiopia.fact: Ethiopia is widely regarded as the birthplace of coffee and has never been formally colonized.

fiji.name: Fiji
fiji.fact: Fiji is an island nation made up of more than 330 islands known for coral reefs and tropical beaches.

finland.name: Finland
finland.fact: Finland is known as the 'Land of a Thousand Lakes' and is famous for saunas and the Northern Lights.

france.name: France
france.fact: France is the world's most visited country and is home to the Eiffel Tower and the Louvre Museum.

gabon.name: Gabon
gabon.fact: Gabon is covered by dense rainforests and is home to a rich variety of wildlife including forest elephants and gorillas.

gambia.name: Gambia
gambia.fact: The Gambia is the smallest country on mainland Africa and follows the course of the Gambia River.

georgia.name: Georgia
georgia.fact: Georgia is considered one of the oldest wine-producing regions in the world, with over 8,000 years of winemaking history.

germany.name: Germany
germany.fact: Germany is Europe's largest economy and is known for engineering, castles, and Oktoberfest.

ghana.name: Ghana
ghana.fact: Ghana was the first sub-Saharan African country to gain independence from colonial rule in 1957.

greece.name: Greece
greece.fact: Greece is regarded as the birthplace of democracy, philosophy, and the Olympic Games.

grenada.name: Grenada
grenada.fact: Grenada is known as the 'Spice Isle' because it is one of the world's leading producers of nutmeg.

guatemala.name: Guatemala
guatemala.fact: Guatemala is home to impressive Mayan ruins, including the ancient city of Tikal.

guinea.name: Guinea
guinea.fact: Guinea has some of the world's largest reserves of bauxite, the primary ore used to produce aluminum.

guinea-bissau.name: Guinea-Bissau
guinea-bissau.fact: Guinea-Bissau is known for the Bijagós Archipelago, a UNESCO Biosphere Reserve.

guyana.name: Guyana
guyana.fact: Guyana is the only English-speaking country in South America and is home to Kaieteur Falls.

haiti.name: Haiti
haiti.fact: Haiti became the world's first independent Black republic in 1804.

honduras.name: Honduras
honduras.fact: Honduras is home to the ancient Mayan archaeological site of Copán.

hungary.name: Hungary
hungary.fact: Hungary is famous for its thermal baths, paprika, and the Danube River.

iceland.name: Iceland
iceland.fact: Iceland is known for volcanoes, glaciers, geysers, and the spectacular Northern Lights.

india.name: India
india.fact: India is the world's most populous country and is home to the iconic Taj Mahal.

indonesia.name: Indonesia
indonesia.fact: Indonesia is the world's largest archipelago, consisting of more than 17,000 islands.

iran.name: Iran
iran.fact: Iran is one of the world's oldest civilizations, with a history spanning thousands of years.

iraq.name: Iraq
iraq.fact: Iraq is home to ancient Mesopotamia, often called the 'Cradle of Civilization.'

ireland.name: Ireland
ireland.fact: Ireland is known as the Emerald Isle because of its lush green landscapes.

israel.name: Israel
israel.fact: Israel is home to the Dead Sea, the lowest land point on Earth.

italy.name: Italy
italy.fact: Italy is famous for its rich history, Roman landmarks, Renaissance art, pizza, and pasta.

jamaica.name: Jamaica
jamaica.fact: Jamaica is the birthplace of reggae music and legendary sprinter Usain Bolt.

japan.name: Japan
japan.fact: Japan is an island nation famous for Mount Fuji, cherry blossoms, and advanced technology.

jordan.name: Jordan
jordan.fact: Jordan is home to Petra, one of the New Seven Wonders of the World.

kazakhstan.name: Kazakhstan
kazakhstan.fact: Kazakhstan is the world's largest landlocked country and is known for its vast steppes.

kenya.name: Kenya
kenya.fact: Kenya is famous for its wildlife safaris and the Great Migration in the Maasai Mara.

kiribati.name: Kiribati
kiribati.fact: Kiribati is one of the first countries in the world to welcome each new day due to its location near the International Date Line.

kuwait.name: Kuwait
kuwait.fact: Kuwait has one of the world's strongest currencies and large petroleum reserves.

kyrgyzstan.name: Kyrgyzstan
kyrgyzstan.fact: Kyrgyzstan is known for its dramatic mountain scenery and nomadic traditions.

laos.name: Laos
laos.fact: Laos is the only landlocked country in Southeast Asia and is famous for the Mekong River.

latvia.name: Latvia
latvia.fact: Latvia is known for its extensive forests, medieval architecture, and Art Nouveau buildings.

lebanon.name: Lebanon
lebanon.fact: Lebanon is home to ancient Phoenician cities and the famous Cedars of Lebanon.

lesotho.name: Lesotho
lesotho.fact: Lesotho is the only independent country entirely above 1,000 meters in elevation.

liberia.name: Liberia
liberia.fact: Liberia was founded by formerly enslaved African Americans and is Africa's oldest republic.

libya.name: Libya
libya.fact: Over 90% of Libya is covered by the Sahara Desert.

liechtenstein.name: Liechtenstein
liechtenstein.fact: Liechtenstein is one of the world's smallest countries and has no airport.

lithuania.name: Lithuania
lithuania.fact: Lithuania was the first Soviet republic to declare independence in 1990.

luxembourg.name: Luxembourg
luxembourg.fact: Luxembourg is one of the world's wealthiest countries by GDP per capita.

madagascar.name: Madagascar
madagascar.fact: Madagascar is the world's fourth-largest island and is home to thousands of plant and animal species found nowhere else on Earth.

malawi.name: Malawi
malawi.fact: Malawi is known as the 'Warm Heart of Africa' because of the friendliness of its people.

malaysia.name: Malaysia
malaysia.fact: Malaysia is famous for its multicultural society, tropical rainforests, and the Petronas Twin Towers.

maldives.name: Maldives
maldives.fact: The Maldives is the world's lowest-lying country, with an average elevation of about 1.5 meters above sea level.

mali.name: Mali
mali.fact: Mali was once home to the wealthy Mali Empire and the legendary city of Timbuktu.

malta.name: Malta
malta.fact: Malta is one of Europe's smallest countries and has a history dating back over 7,000 years.

marshallislands.name: Marshall Islands
marshallislands.fact: The Marshall Islands consist of 29 coral atolls and over 1,000 individual islands.

mauritania.name: Mauritania
mauritania.fact: About 90% of Mauritania is covered by the Sahara Desert.

mauritius.name: Mauritius
mauritius.fact: Mauritius is famous for its coral reefs, lagoons, beaches, and as the former home of the extinct dodo bird.

mexico.name: Mexico
mexico.fact: Mexico is home to ancient civilizations such as the Maya and Aztecs and has the world's largest Spanish-speaking population.

micronesia.name: Micronesia
micronesia.fact: The Federated States of Micronesia consists of more than 600 islands scattered across the western Pacific Ocean.

moldova.name: Moldova
moldova.fact: Moldova is known for having one of the world's largest underground wine cellars.

monaco.name: Monaco
monaco.fact: Monaco is the world's second-smallest country and is famous for its luxury lifestyle and Formula One Grand Prix.

mongolia.name: Mongolia
mongolia.fact: Mongolia has one of the lowest population densities in the world and was once the center of Genghis Khan's empire.

montenegro.name: Montenegro
montenegro.fact: Montenegro is known for its stunning Adriatic coastline and the picturesque Bay of Kotor.

morocco.name: Morocco
morocco.fact: Morocco is famous for its vibrant markets, the Atlas Mountains, and the Sahara Desert.

mozambique.name: Mozambique
mozambique.fact: Mozambique has a coastline stretching over 2,400 kilometers along the Indian Ocean.

myanmar.name: Myanmar
myanmar.fact: Myanmar is home to Bagan, an ancient city with thousands of Buddhist temples and pagodas.

namibia.name: Namibia
namibia.fact: Namibia is home to the Namib Desert, considered the world's oldest desert.

nauru.name: Nauru
nauru.fact: Nauru is the world's third-smallest country by land area and has no official capital city.

nepal.name: Nepal
nepal.fact: Nepal is home to Mount Everest, the highest mountain on Earth.

netherlands.name: Netherlands
netherlands.fact: The Netherlands is famous for its windmills, tulips, canals, and extensive cycling culture.

newzealand.name: New Zealand
newzealand.fact: New Zealand is known for its breathtaking landscapes and as the filming location of The Lord of the Rings trilogy.

nicaragua.name: Nicaragua
nicaragua.fact: Nicaragua is home to Lake Nicaragua, the largest lake in Central America.

niger.name: Niger
niger.fact: Much of Niger is covered by the Sahara Desert, making it one of the hottest countries in the world.

nigeria.name: Nigeria
nigeria.fact: Nigeria is Africa's most populous country and is known for its vibrant music and film industries.

northkorea.name: North Korea
northkorea.fact: North Korea officially calls itself the Democratic People's Republic of Korea (DPRK).

northmacedonia.name: North Macedonia
northmacedonia.fact: North Macedonia changed its official name from Macedonia in 2019 after an agreement with Greece.

norway.name: Norway
norway.fact: Norway is famous for its spectacular fjords and is one of the world's leading producers of salmon.

oman.name: Oman
oman.fact: Oman is known for its ancient forts, deserts, and beautiful coastline along the Arabian Sea.

pakistan.name: Pakistan
pakistan.fact: Pakistan is home to K2, the world's second-highest mountain.

palau.name: Palau
palau.fact: Palau is famous for its Rock Islands and Jellyfish Lake.

palestine.name: Palestine
palestine.fact: Palestine consists of the West Bank and the Gaza Strip and has a rich cultural and historical heritage.

panama.name: Panama
panama.fact: Panama is home to the Panama Canal, one of the world's most important shipping routes.

papuanewguinea.name: Papua New Guinea
papuanewguinea.fact: Papua New Guinea has more than 800 indigenous languages, the highest linguistic diversity in the world.

paraguay.name: Paraguay
paraguay.fact: Paraguay is one of the few countries where most people are bilingual in Spanish and an indigenous language.

peru.name: Peru
peru.fact: Peru is home to Machu Picchu, the famous Inca citadel high in the Andes Mountains.

philippines.name: Philippines
philippines.fact: The Philippines is an archipelago of more than 7,600 islands known for its biodiversity and beautiful beaches.

poland.name: Poland
poland.fact: Poland is the birthplace of astronomer Nicolaus Copernicus and composer Frédéric Chopin.

portugal.name: Portugal
portugal.fact: Portugal is one of the world's oldest nations and is famous for explorers, port wine, and fado music.

qatar.name: Qatar
qatar.fact: Qatar hosted the 2022 FIFA World Cup, the first World Cup held in the Middle East.

romania.name: Romania
romania.fact: Romania is home to Transylvania, a region famously associated with the Dracula legend.

russia.name: Russia
russia.fact: Russia is the largest country in the world, spanning 11 time zones across Europe and Asia.

rwanda.name: Rwanda
rwanda.fact: Rwanda is known as the 'Land of a Thousand Hills' and is famous for its mountain gorillas.

saintkittsandnevis.name: Saint Kitts and Nevis
saintkittsandnevis.fact: Saint Kitts and Nevis is the smallest sovereign state in the Western Hemisphere by both area and population.

saintlucia.name: Saint Lucia
saintlucia.fact: Saint Lucia is famous for the Pitons, two volcanic peaks recognized as a UNESCO World Heritage Site.

stvincentandthegrenadines.name: Saint Vincent and the Grenadines
stvincentandthegrenadines.fact: Saint Vincent and the Grenadines consists of the main island of Saint Vincent and a chain of smaller islands.

samoa.name: Samoa
samoa.fact: Samoa is known for its rich Polynesian culture and stunning tropical scenery.

sanmarino.name: San Marino
sanmarino.fact: San Marino is one of the world's oldest republics, founded in 301 AD.

saotomeandprincipe.name: Sao Tome and Principe
saotomeandprincipe.fact: São Tomé and Príncipe is Africa's second-smallest country and is known for cocoa production.

saudiarabia.name: Saudi Arabia
saudiarabia.fact: Saudi Arabia is home to Islam's two holiest cities, Mecca and Medina.

senegal.name: Senegal
senegal.fact: Senegal is known for its vibrant music, culture, and the historic Gorée Island.

serbia.name: Serbia
serbia.fact: Serbia is located at the crossroads of Central and Southeast Europe and has a rich medieval history.

seychelles.name: Seychelles
seychelles.fact: Seychelles is an island nation famous for its white-sand beaches and giant tortoises.

sierraleone.name: Sierra Leone
sierraleone.fact: Sierra Leone is known for its beautiful Atlantic beaches and diamond resources.

singapore.name: Singapore
singapore.fact: Singapore is one of the world's leading financial centers and is known for its cleanliness and modern skyline.

slovakia.name: Slovakia
slovakia.fact: Slovakia has more castles per capita than almost any other country in the world.

slovenia.name: Slovenia
slovenia.fact: Slovenia is famous for Lake Bled and its extensive cave systems.

solomonislands.name: Solomon Islands
solomonislands.fact: The Solomon Islands consist of nearly 1,000 islands in the South Pacific Ocean.

somalia.name: Somalia
somalia.fact: Somalia has Africa's longest coastline along the Indian Ocean.

southafrica.name: South Africa
southafrica.language: Zulu, Xhosa, Afrikaans, English and others
southafrica.fact: South Africa is the only country in the world with three capital cities.

southkorea.name: South Korea
southkorea.fact: South Korea is known for K-pop, advanced technology, and companies like Samsung and Hyundai.

southsudan.name: South Sudan
southsudan.fact: South Sudan became the world's newest independent country in 2011.

spain.name: Spain
spain.fact: Spain is famous for flamenco, football, and landmarks like the Sagrada Família.

srilanka.name: Sri Lanka
srilanka.fact: Sri Lanka is known for its tea plantations, ancient temples, and diverse wildlife.

sudan.name: Sudan
sudan.fact: Sudan has more pyramids than Egypt, built by the ancient Kingdom of Kush.

suriname.name: Suriname
suriname.fact: Suriname is the smallest independent country in South America and is largely covered by rainforest.

sweden.name: Sweden
sweden.fact: Sweden is known for innovation, IKEA, Volvo, and the Nobel Prize.

switzerland.name: Switzerland
switzerland.fact: Switzerland is famous for the Alps, chocolate, watches, and its long-standing neutrality.

syria.name: Syria
syria.fact: Damascus is considered one of the oldest continuously inhabited cities in the world.

tajikistan.name: Tajikistan
tajikistan.fact: Over 90% of Tajikistan is covered by mountains, making it one of the most mountainous countries in the world.

tanzania.name: Tanzania
tanzania.fact: Tanzania is home to Mount Kilimanjaro, Africa's highest mountain, and Serengeti National Park.

thailand.name: Thailand
thailand.fact: Thailand is the only Southeast Asian country never colonized by a European power.

timor-leste.name: Timor-Leste
timor-leste.fact: Timor-Leste became an independent nation in 2002 after gaining independence from Indonesia.

togo.name: Togo
togo.fact: Togo is a narrow West African country known for its palm-lined beaches and vibrant markets.

tonga.name: Tonga
tonga.fact: Tonga is the only Pacific island nation that has never been fully colonized.

trinidadandtobago.name: Trinidad and Tobago
trinidadandtobago.fact: Trinidad and Tobago is the birthplace of the steelpan musical instrument.

tunisia.name: Tunisia
tunisia.fact: Tunisia is home to the ancient city of Carthage and served as a filming location for Star Wars.

turkey.name: Turkey
turkey.fact: Turkey spans two continents, Europe and Asia, separated by the Bosporus Strait.

turkmenistan.name: Turkmenistan
turkmenistan.fact: Turkmenistan is famous for the 'Door to Hell,' a natural gas crater that has burned for decades.

tuvalu.name: Tuvalu
tuvalu.fact: Tuvalu is one of the world's smallest and lowest-lying countries, making it vulnerable to rising sea levels.

uganda.name: Uganda
uganda.fact: Uganda is home to half of the world's remaining mountain gorillas.

ukraine.name: Ukraine
ukraine.fact: Ukraine is one of Europe's largest countries and is often called the 'Breadbasket of Europe' because of its fertile farmland.

unitedarabemirates.name: United Arab Emirates
unitedarabemirates.fact: The United Arab Emirates is home to the Burj Khalifa, the world's tallest building.

unitedkingdom.name: United Kingdom
unitedkingdom.fact: The United Kingdom consists of England, Scotland, Wales, and Northern Ireland.

unitedstatesofamerica.name: United States
unitedstatesofamerica.fact: The United States has 50 states and is home to landmarks such as the Grand Canyon and the Statue of Liberty.

uruguay.name: Uruguay
uruguay.fact: Uruguay is one of South America's most stable democracies and is known for its beaches and football culture.

uzbekistan.name: Uzbekistan
uzbekistan.fact: Uzbekistan is home to the historic Silk Road cities of Samarkand, Bukhara, and Khiva.

vanuatu.name: Vanuatu
vanuatu.fact: Vanuatu is an island nation with active volcanoes and rich Melanesian culture.

vaticancity.name: Vatican City
vaticancity.fact: Vatican City is the smallest independent country in the world and the headquarters of the Roman Catholic Church.

venezuela.name: Venezuela
venezuela.fact: Venezuela is home to Angel Falls, the world's tallest uninterrupted waterfall.

vietnam.name: Vietnam
vietnam.fact: Vietnam is famous for Ha Long Bay, rich cuisine, and the world's second-largest coffee exports.

yemen.name: Yemen
yemen.fact: Yemen is home to the unique Socotra Island, known for its dragon blood trees.

zambia.name: Zambia
zambia.fact: Zambia shares Victoria Falls, one of the world's largest waterfalls, with Zimbabwe.

zimbabwe.name: Zimbabwe
zimbabwe.fact: Zimbabwe is home to the ancient stone city of Great Zimbabwe, a UNESCO World Heritage Site.
